reviews.review_description:
I have all the graffiti apps, and this one to me is the most accurate when it comes to can control and paint physics.
I am able to get straight lines and start + stop accurately just like with a real can, the angular spray is very accurate as well.. I absolutely love the simplicity of the controls and paint/cap selection. The other big apps feel very frustrating to use compared to this one. 
I am hoping more walls get added, I would like to have a realistic looking, flat concrete wall, to do detailed work on.

reviews.review_title: Got addicted for a short time
reviews.review_description: I bought this when there was only 1 wall and it would be the first game I played every time I put the headset on. I would add a little something to the wall before playing another game. Unfortunately I lost all my art when the update came out with the second wall, no biggie. What I don't understand is why there are 3 areas now though when instead you could just add more walls to the starting room and increase the size of it. It would be good if the starting room was your private space and the other areas were public allowing you to create with other artists. One area could be a public lobby whilst the other could be a private lobby. Would be cool to see things like can rattle or paint dripping if spraying in one spot for too long. Controls could be better, they get me confused sometimes.

+ created by ONE PASSIONATE person simply because he wanted a "Graffiti Simulator" WITH support 
+ the lighting is great and when taking pics, no filters are needed (when taking pics in another Graff App, it's mostly dark, colors are off, and many filters are needed just to get the same result as in their game) 
+ paint application looks legit
+  IMPROVING WITH UPDATES
+ I LOVE the movement and how teleporting now keeps you at the same height! (see? Always updating as it didn't do that before!)
+ 2 locations but, one of them is H-U-G-E!!! (and I'm sure more will come later!)

...this game has the potential to be a $39.99 game!!!

The game is promising, although there is still much to add. First, the movement in space needs to be corrected. The four directional arrows should allow moving left, right, up, and down on the wall. To move backward, it would be better to use the rear trigger on the controller. It would also be helpful to add an option to save the chosen color. For the rest, the game seems really realistic. Maybe consider adding other outdoor environments in the future. Keep up the good work!

reviews.review_title: The most promising WIP app in my library
reviews.review_description: This is the most promising work in progress app in my library, it's growing fast and very interesting. I'm following with enthusiasm.

Not much competition for the “other” graffiti game, so im glad to see this release. 

It is off to a good start, and i understand there isn’t a team behind it.
These comments are not meant to discourage purchases or the developer, just things i would like to see.
Its not like the other graffiti game has had any updates so i welcome new entries.

Opportunities to improve:
1. The pallet on the left hand is very large
2. I wish the advanced button was easier press
3. Varying levels of detail on the walls as you look up and down at the edges of field of view
4. Controls need to see redirection, they are not intuitive.
5. No can rattle

Things that i like:
I like the level of control with the spray
I like the spray sounds
I like being able to float easily 

Good luck
